notes: process_violation: no_clarifying_question — model asks good targeted questions but also produces partial artefact sections (hypotheses, common culprits, architecture context framing) from thin input, violating the clarification gate; d3 and d4 score 0.0 because no bounded MVP or out-of-scope items exist, and d1 is partially penalised because the 'Common culprits' section edges into solution framing from unverified assumptions.
